descriptionShort: Langley Advance columnist discusses Bryan Moller's contribution to Richmond Sockeyes in first Centennial Cup final game versus Humboldt.
descriptionLong: A Langley Advance sports columnist reflects on the earlier trade of scoring ace Bryan Moller from the Langley Eagles to the Richmond Sockeyes, noting Moller's consistent performance during Richmond's Centennial Cup final series against the Humboldt Broncos. Moller scored in Richmond's 5-3 loss in Game 1 of the best-of-seven series; Game 2 results were pending press deadline.

attribution.headline: Maybe we shouldn't have traded him
